Plumber in Harahan, LA

Trusted local professionals serving Harahan and surrounding communities

Serving Harahan, LA

Paul D Plumber extends its expert plumbing services to the community of Harahan, Louisiana. As a residential area near New Orleans, Harahan presents a blend of residential plumbing needs. We are well-versed in addressing the specific requirements of homes in this area. Our services in Harahan include everything from drain cleaning and water heater repair to sewer line inspection and replacement. We understand the importance of having a reliable plumbing system, and we are dedicated to providing prompt, efficient, and affordable solutions to keep your plumbing running smoothly. We offer 24/7 emergency service for those unexpected plumbing disasters.

Harahan is a residential community known for its excellent schools and convenient location near New Orleans.

Drain Cleaning

Fast and effective drain cleaning to keep your plumbing flowing smoothly.

Sewer Line Services

Expert sewer line repair and replacement to keep your system flowing.

Fixture Installation

Professional installation of faucets, sinks, toilets, and more.

Gas Line Services
